title: Productos CRUD completo

tests.name: POST /api/onboarding/import-products
tests.evidence: 200 inserted=2 fallback=pos_products (tabla products no existe en supabase, fallback a pos_products)

tests.name: GET /api/products?export=csv
tests.evidence: 200 Content-Type text/csv; valid CSV with header id,code,name,category,price,cost,stock

fixes_applied: GET /api/products: nuevos query params q (ilike name/code/category), low_stock (stock<=10), export=csv (text/csv content-type), limit
enforcePlanLimits: ahora resuelve req.user via JWT/api-key antes de consultar tenant_id (antes devolvia 401 unauthorized en POST /api/products porque corria fuera de requireAuth)
POST /api/onboarding/import-products: fallback de tabla 'products' (no existe) a 'pos_products' con mapping sku->code; antes fallaba porque generic_blobs tampoco existe
